Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. CERN to host a new phase of Open Research Europe 177 upvotes, 16 comments
  2. OpenTelemetry profiles enters public alpha 141 upvotes, 15 comments
  3. Show HN: Veil – Dark mode PDFs without destroying images, runs in the browser 16 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. Why so many control rooms were seafoam green (2025) 517 upvotes, 101 comments
  5. How much precision can you squeeze out of a table? 37 upvotes, 4 comments
  6. Deploytarot.com – tarot card reading for deployments 123 upvotes, 25 comments
  7. Order Granting Preliminary Injunction – Anthropic vs. U.S. Department of War [pdf] 24 upvotes, 2 comments
  8. Show HN: Turbolite – a SQLite VFS serving sub-250ms cold JOIN queries from S3 98 upvotes, 24 comments
  9. From zero to a RAG system: successes and failures 274 upvotes, 84 comments
  10. John Bradley, author of xv, has died 194 upvotes, 58 comments
  11. Running Tesla Model 3's computer on my desk using parts from crashed cars 846 upvotes, 297 comments
  12. Stripe Projects: Provision and manage services from the CLI 98 upvotes, 27 comments
  13. My home network observes bedtime with OpenBSD and pf 109 upvotes, 31 comments
  14. Whistler: Live eBPF Programming from the Common Lisp REPL 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  15. DOOM Over DNS 187 upvotes, 60 comments
  16. Cloudflare's Gen 13 servers: trading cache for cores for 2x performance 60 upvotes, 16 comments
  17. New York City hospitals drop Palantir as controversial AI firm expands in UK 242 upvotes, 91 comments
  18. Show HN: Fio: 3D World editor/game engine – inspired by Radiant and Hammer 22 upvotes, 4 comments
  19. Fast regex search: indexing text for agent tools 24 upvotes, 5 comments
  20. My minute-by-minute response to the LiteLLM malware attack 269 upvotes, 120 comments
  21. Moving from GitHub to Codeberg, for lazy people 498 upvotes, 250 comments
  22. HyperAgents: Self-referential self-improving agents 115 upvotes, 49 comments
  23. Colibri – chat platform built on the AT Protocol for communities big and small 96 upvotes, 51 comments
  24. Show HN: I put an AI agent on a $7/month VPS with IRC as its transport layer 24 upvotes, 9 comments
  25. We haven't seen the worst of what gambling and prediction markets will do 502 upvotes, 351 comments
  26. Using FireWire on a Raspberry Pi 42 upvotes, 20 comments
  27. Chicago artist creates tourism posters for city's neighborhoods 6 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. We Rewrote JSONata with AI in a Day, Saved $500K/Year 54 upvotes, 48 comments
  29. Apple Discontinues Mac Pro 7 upvotes, 4 comments
  30. Anthropic Subprocessor Changes 18 upvotes, 18 comments

Last generated 8:00am, 27 March 2026. Source here.
